data.name: Vengeance Of The Minotaur RPG
data.detailed_description:
Steam killed the game due to payment processor issues a few months ago, there is not much I can do, you can play the DEMO or the Early Access version on the website.

Vengeance of the Minotaur is an open world, old-school turn-based RPG that fuses explicit sexual themes with deep strategic party-building and brutal combat. Follow Asterion, the last demigod Minotaur, imprisoned for millennia by humans for dark, nefarious purposes. Unleash his savage quest for revenge, claiming their women and conquering their world in a relentless campaign of domination.

  • Delve into dungeons filled with randomized loot and a dynamic equipment system, enabling diverse and unique builds for your heroes and party.

  • Defeat enemies through strategic turn-based combat using diverse skill combinations. Rape weakened enemies to grow stronger.

  • Fuck your party members to make them stronger, a new unique sex scene is unlocked per level for each companion.

data.short_description: Vengeance of the Minotaur is an open-world, turn-based RPG blending explicit sexual themes with strategic party-building and brutal combat. Master tactical battles, customize unique heroes, and dominate foes to unleash Asterion’s savage quest for revenge.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11 (El Capitan) or later (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Both
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any Distro (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
